press.quote: Directed with a wink and a smile, with charming Dutch kitsch and a spirited ensemble — operetta entertainment with heart, wit and timeless music.
Pure jubilation — the Kammeroper Frankfurt sets the Palmengarten ablaze. A glorious, exhilarating and captivating entertainment.
